name: Auntie Rose Gross' Mandlebreit
recipeIngredient: 4 and a half cups sifted flour
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Grease two large cookie sheets.
3. In a large bowl, beat the eggs and sugar until light and fluffy.
4. Add the vegetable oil and vanilla extract.
5. Mix in the baking powder, salt, sifted flour, and chopped almonds until the dough is well combined and does not stick to your hands.
6. Shape the dough into four flat loaves.
7. Place the loaves on the prepared cookie sheets.
8. Bake for 45 minutes.
9. Remove from the oven and slice each loaf diagonally.
10. Arrange the slices back on the sheets as separate cookies.
11. Toast each side of the cookies for 5 minutes each.
